headline: United Rentals Bulls Still In Control
summary: United Rentals stock has surged over 30%, and may have further room to run. Here's why momentum remains strong.

headline: Barclays Maintains Underweight on United Rentals, Raises Price Target to $715
summary: Barclays  analyst Adam Seiden   maintains United Rentals (NYSE:URI) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $600 to $715.
